content_type: social media post graphic / statement card
description: A White House graphic combining a black-and-white photograph with an overlaid social-media post screenshot. The top two-thirds is a high-contrast monochrome photo of Donald Trump standing in a White House corridor, wearing a dark suit, white shirt, dark tie, and a U.S. flag lapel pin, looking off-camera mid-speech; the edge of a second person is visible at the right. Overlaid across the middle in very large white serif title text is 'Meeting With Brazil'. Below that sits a white rounded card in the style of a Truth Social or X post: a small flag-stylized Trump avatar, bold 'Donald J. Trump' name with blue verified check and a dark app badge, '@realDonaldTrump' handle, and post text with the opening sentence highlighted in yellow. The post reads verbatim: 'Just concluded my meeting with Luiz Inacio Lula da Silva, the very dynamic President of Brazil. We discussed many topics, including Trade and, specifically, Tariffs. The meeting went very well. Our Representatives are scheduled to get together to discuss certain key elements. Additional meetings will be scheduled over the coming months, as necessary. President DONALD J. TRUMP'. At the bottom is the engraved White House logo and 'The WHITE HOUSE' wordmark.
notable_text: Meeting With Brazil; Just concluded my meeting with Luiz Inacio Lula da Silva, the very dynamic President of Brazil... including Trade and, specifically, Tariffs. President DONALD J. TRUMP
